_meta.description: Live-projector bus-delivery health, one doc per (trace_id) at turn completion (FRE-557 / ADR-0088 D6 sink 2). model_calls_received vs COUNT(api_costs WHERE trace_id) detects bus/stream:turn.observed delivery loss to the projector — ORTHOGONAL to the route-trace ledger's cost_reconciled (which is per-loop accumulator drift, ADR-0088 D3). projector_live_cost_usd is the bus-accumulated live meter captured BEFORE the authoritative reconcile. observation_complete=false ⇒ the obs was freshly created at completion (evicted mid-turn / never-seen) so its counters are untrustworthy. dynamic:false with an explicit schema — join key keyword, *_usd double, counters long — no dynamic-mapping trap. Index agent-monitors-projector-health-YYYY-MM-DD.
